title: extra stone
description: this mod adds more types of stone
body:
this mod adds more variatons of stone that you can make in a stonecutter and blast furnace  
The new types of stone  
- Stone with holes  
- Reinforced stone (twice as strong as stone)  
- Stone planks  
- Extra smooth stone  
- cobbly stone  

I thoroughly enjoyed making this mod as it provided me with a meaningful activity. I'm pleased with the outcome; how about you?
